title: Air Fryer BBQ Chicken for Pizza
description: Simply seasoned chicken breast tossed in homemade BBQ sauce and air fried for caramelized, pizza-ready chicken that won't soggy your crust.
ingredients: 500g (about 2 medium) chicken breasts, diced into 2cm cubes
instructions: Dice 500g chicken breast into roughly 2cm cubes.
In a bowl, toss the diced chicken with 1/2 tsp garlic powder, 1/2 tsp smoked paprika, and salt and pepper to taste.
Add 2 tbsp of BBQ sauce and toss until evenly coated.
Air fry at 400°F for 12–14 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until chicken is cooked through and caramelized at the edges.
Let rest 2–3 minutes before adding to your pizza.
notes: Dice chicken uniformly so pieces cook evenly. The BBQ sauce will caramelize — that's the goal. Don't overcrowd the air fryer basket or you'll steam instead of caramelize. Cook in batches if needed.
